note: Views Templates is a developer API: modules define a @ViewsBuilder plugin (discovered from Plugin/ViewsTemplateBuilder) to ship a View as a template that site builders clone into a real View entity. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: In a Drupal 11 module I want to ship a pre-built View that Views Templates exposes. What plugin type do I define, in which src subdirectory does it live, and what annotation does it use?
evals.expected_output: Define a ViewsBuilder plugin under src/Plugin/ViewsTemplateBuilder using the @ViewsBuilder annotation; it is discovered by plugin.manager.views_templates.builder.

evals.prompt: Views Templates offers two base classes for building a View template. Which base class do I extend to build the View programmatically in code, and which do I extend to clone a View from a *.yml template file?
evals.expected_output: Extend ViewsBuilderBase (override createView()) to build a View in code; extend ViewsDuplicateBuilderBase to clone a View from a *.yml template file.

evals.prompt: When using a ViewsDuplicateBuilderBase template, where in my module must the Views template YAML file live, and how is its filename determined?
evals.expected_output: Put the YAML in the module's views_templates/ directory; the file is <view_template_id>.yml where view_template_id comes from the plugin annotation (loaded by the views_templates.loader service).

evals.prompt: How do I substitute values (like a title or field id) into a cloned Views template with Views Templates, and how are the annotation keys turned into placeholders?
evals.expected_output: Declare replace_values in the @ViewsBuilder annotation; each key becomes an __UPPERCASE placeholder that is replaced recursively in the template (keys and values), and a NULL value deletes the key.

evals.prompt: As a site builder on Drupal 11, where in the admin UI do I create a new View from a registered Views Template, and what permission is required?
evals.expected_output: Use the 'Add view from template' action at /admin/structure/views/template/list; the routes require the core 'administer views' permission.

evals.prompt: In PHP, how do I instantiate a Views Templates builder plugin and create a View entity from it? Which service do I use?
evals.expected_output: Get plugin.manager.views_templates.builder, createInstance(pluginId), then $builder->createView($options) which returns an unsaved View entity to save().

evals.prompt: What Drupal module does Views Templates depend on, and does it provide its own configuration UI or permissions?
evals.expected_output: It depends only on core Views (drupal:views); it provides no settings form (configure is null) and no permissions of its own — the UI uses the core 'administer views' permission.

evals.prompt: Which alter hook lets me modify or remove Views Templates builder plugin definitions provided by other modules?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_views_template_builder_info_alter(&$definitions) (alter id views_template_builder_info) to add/modify/remove builder definitions.
